center.name: Mayo River (Peru)
center.summary: The Mayo River lies in northern Peru and flows near the city of Moyobamba.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The other population is found in the upper valley of the Mayo River near the border of northern Peru's San Martín and Amazonas departments
